entries.title: Ulta Beauty Deploys Google-Powered AI Assistant and Agentic Commerce
entries.summary: Shoppers looking for beauty products will soon be able to get personalized assistance powered by artificial intelligence on Google surfaces and on Ulta Beauty’s digital properties. These shopping experiences will be enabled by solutions launched by Ulta Beauty and powered by Google’s Gemini, the companies said in a Wednesday (April 22) press release. entries.title: Beauty Giants Race to Own the AI Shopping Moment
entries.summary: The next time a customer wants a foundation shade, she might not open a search engine. She’ll ask an AI. Sephora launched an app inside ChatGPT. Fenty Beauty built an artificial intelligence adviser on WhatsApp. Ulta Beauty rolled out agentic commerce across Google’s AI surfaces. Three platforms, three brands, one problem: Purchase intent is […] The post Beauty Giants Race to Own the AI Shop

entries.title: CFPB Final Rule on Credit Unchanged From Industry-Supported Proposal
entries.summary: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) published its final rule on the Equal Credit Opportunity Act (Regulation B) on Wednesday (April 22). The CFPB said in its summary of the final rule that it amends provisions related to disparate impact, discouragement of applicants or prospective applicants, and special purpose credit programs under the regulation […] The post CFPB Final Rule o

entries.title: Banking Associations Seek Pause in GENIUS Act Rulemaking Process
entries.summary: Four banking associations are looking to pause the rulemaking process for the GENIUS Act until one of the relevant final rules has been issued. entries.title: Visa Launches Validator Node on Tempo Blockchain
entries.summary: Visa has joined the Tempo network as an anchor validator, supporting transaction validation and accelerating the development of onchain payment infrastructure. entries.title: Visa Commences Exchange Offer for Class B-1 and Class B-2 Common Stock
entries.summary: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Visa (NYSE: V) today commenced an Exchange Offer pursuant to which its Class B-1 and Class B-2 common stock may be exchanged for a combination of Visa’s Class B-3 common stock, Visa’s Class C common stock, which will be freely tradeable following temporary transfer restrictions, and, where applicable, cash consideration in lieu of fractional shares. entries.title: Visa to Announce Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28, 2026
entries.summary: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Visa (NYSE: V) will report its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026.
